ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: Good quality, text-based PDF with clear text in all fields.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: Good quality, text-based PDF with clear text on both pages.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-26D-448659 and the remarks field contains 2264501601, neither of which constitutes a Letter of Credit reference. No bank-term context found.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 — header/branding: 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'
Invoice page 1 — footer: 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'
Invoice page 1 — VAT block: 'VAT No. SE556012980001'
Invoice page 2 — footer: 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'
Invoice page 2 — closing: 'Best regards Calderys Nordic AB'

criteria_met: Consignor 'Calderys Nordic AB' identified in invoice header, footer, and VAT block.
Consignee 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED' identified in invoice Company and Delivery address fields.
Reference number 2264501601 from certificate remarks matches invoice Reference no.
pairing_validation.reasoning: All three pairing criteria are met: consignor match, consignee match, and reference number match. The document pair is valid.

candidates.raw_text: SURVEY NO.77/1 VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI SHEELPARA-PANVEL ROAD DIST.THANE, MAHARASHTRA
candidates.normalized_text: survey no.77/1 village:dahisar-mori sheelpara-panvel road dist.thane, maharashtra

candidates.raw_text: CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED (FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)
SURVEY NO.77/1,VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI SHEELPARA - PANVEL ROAD, 0 DIST. THANE, MAHRASH INDIA
candidates.normalized_text: survey no.77/1, village:dahisar-mori sheelpara - panvel road, dist. thane, maharashtra, india

candidates.raw_text: CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED (FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)

consignor.certificate_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Forshammarsgatan 2, SE- 662 32, ÅMÅL, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden (header, footer, VAT block)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Calderys Nordic AB' anywhere in invoice files.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — Name 'Calderys Nordic AB' found in invoice header/branding on page 1, in footer text on pages 1 and 2, and in closing text on page 2. This constitutes an exact match of the company name.
MATCH — Footer explicitly states 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'. Additionally, VAT number prefix SE (SE556012980001) confirms Sweden. IBAN prefix SE also confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found explicitly in invoice header, footer and closing text.
Country verified via explicit 'Sweden' in footer and SE-prefix in VAT number.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Calderys Nordic AB' with country 'Sweden'. The invoice is issued by Calderys Nordic AB (appears in header branding, footer on both pages, and closing text 'Best regards Calderys Nordic AB'). The address differs (certificate: Forshammarsgatan 2, Åmål; invoice: Box 216, Höganäs) but per rule 4.1.5 address differences do not cause MISMATCH. Country Sweden confirmed via explicit text and SE-prefix on VAT. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH since consignor name is explicitly identifiable in invoice.

consignee.certificate_value: CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED, SURVEY NO.77/1 VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI SHEELPARA-PANVEL ROAD DIST.THANE, MAHARASHTRA, India
consignee.invoice_value: CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED (FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED), SURVEY NO.77/1,VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI SHEELPARA - PANVEL ROAD, 0 DIST. THANE, MAHRASH, INDIA

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing party in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice 'Company' block (functions as Invoice To/Bill To) contains 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED (FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice billing party name.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED'. Invoice: 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED (FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)'. The certificate name is an exact match to the primary name in the invoice. The parenthetical '(FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)' is additional historical information, not a contradicting different party.
Certificate: 'India'. Invoice: 'INDIA'. MATCH after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Primary billing field (Company block) used for consignee identification.
Company name 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED' exactly matches in invoice.
Country India matches in both documents.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED' in India. Invoice Company (billing) block: 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED (FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)' in India. The core name matches exactly. The parenthetical former name in the invoice is additional information that does not constitute a contradiction. Address details differ slightly (certificate 'MAHARASHTRA' vs invoice 'MAHRASH' which appears to be a truncation) but per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only company name and country matter. Country 'India' matches exactly.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The parenthetical '(FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)' indicates a different company.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: This is historical context showing a name change, not a different party. The primary company name matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are provided in the certificate.
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers are explicitly provided in the certificate goods description. The certificate shows 'CALDERYS INDIA' (which appears to be a marking/reference) and 'Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6' as goods description. No separate article/code number field.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and compare.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate main designation: 'Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6'. Invoice description: 'SVENSKA™ MIX 5 A60 0.6'. After normalization of case (svenska/SVENSKA), the trademark symbol ™ (non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4), and decimal separator (comma vs period for the '0,6'/'0.6' value), the identity-bearing main designation 'SVENSKA MIX 5 A60 0.6' matches exactly.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6' identified in invoice as 'SVENSKA™ MIX 5 A60 0.6' after allowed normalization.
Trademark symbol ™ treated as non-identity-bearing addition.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6'. Invoice goods: 'SVENSKA™ MIX 5 A60 0.6'. Normalization applied: (1) case normalization (svenska→SVENSKA), (2) ™ symbol ignored as non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4, (3) decimal separator ',' vs '.' treated as formatting variation (both represent 0.6). After normalization, the identity-bearing main designation matches exactly. The 'CALDERYS INDIA' text in the certificate goods field appears to be a marking/customer reference, not part of the product name, and does not need to be verified as goods description.

quantity.invoice_value: 100,800 TO (= 100,800 metric tons = 100,800 kg after 3B conversion)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains 'NW 100,800 kg'. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.result: Verification quantity: NW 100,800 kg. The comma in '100,800' needs interpretation.

comparison_steps.description: Determine if '100,800' uses comma as thousands separator or decimal separator.
comparison_steps.result: In the certificate: 'NW 100,800 kg'. Given the context of the product (refractory material shipped internationally, CIF terms), 100.8 metric tons (= 100,800 kg) is a reasonable quantity. The comma here functions as a thousands separator, making the value 100800 kg. In the invoice: '100,800 TO' where TO = metric ton. The comma in the invoice also functions as a thousands separator (European format common in Swedish invoices), giving 100.800 TO = 100800 kg (but see 3B conversion analysis). Actually, reconsidering: the invoice uses European number formatting where comma is decimal separator. '100,800 TO' means 100.800 metric tons = 100,800 kg.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice states 100,800 TO. In European decimal format, this is 100.800 MT. Certificate states NW 100,800 kg.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice: 100.800 MT × 1000 = 100,800 kg. Certificate: 100,800 kg (NW). The values are identical after unit conversion. Note: the certificate uses comma as thousands separator (100,800 kg = 100800 kg) while the invoice uses comma as decimal separator (100,800 TO = 100.800 TO). 100.800 MT = 100800 kg = 100,800 kg (with thousands separator). MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies NW (Net Weight). Invoice states quantity as 100,800 TO without explicit GW/NW designation.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate has a single weight value with NW designation. The invoice provides quantity in TO without NW/GW label. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has one weight value, and the numeric value can be identified in the invoice (after 3B conversion), and the invoice does not contain a contradictory alternative weight of another category. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Exception 3B: Unit conversion between TO (metric tons) and KG. 100.800 MT = 100,800 KG.
Thousands separator normalization applied to interpret comma in numeric values.
Single weight value in certificate (NW), invoice confirms same numeric value without contradictory alternative.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'NW 100,800 kg'. Invoice line item: '100,800 TO'. Analysis of numeric format: The invoice is issued by a Swedish company using European number formatting. In the invoice, '100,800' with unit 'TO' (metric ton) means 100.800 metric tons (comma as decimal separator). Converting: 100.800 MT × 1000 = 100,800 kg. The certificate states NW 100,800 kg where the comma serves as a thousands separator (100800 kg). Both values resolve to the same quantity: 100,800 kg. Exception 3B (MT↔KG conversion) is applied. The weight category NW is stated in the certificate; the invoice does not provide a contradictory alternative weight category, so per 4.4.2.2 point 2 this is acceptable. Tolerance check: values are exactly equal after conversion, well within ±0.1%.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The comma in '100,800 kg' in the certificate is a decimal separator, meaning 100.8 kg.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: 100.8 kg is unreasonable for an international CIF shipment of refractory material. The invoice confirms 100.800 metric tons. The certificate value 100,800 kg (with comma as thousands separator) = 100800 kg = 100.800 MT, consistent with the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin indication in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 1 contains 'MADE IN SWEDEN' in free text above line items. This is an explicit origin statement matching the 'Made in' format identified in rule 4.5.1.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via 'MADE IN SWEDEN' statement in invoice.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice contains 'MADE IN SWEDEN' as an explicit origin statement on page 1. This is a direct, unambiguous match after case normalization. Single origin country, no mixed origins issue.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.
Document A is certificate (COO), Document B is invoice. Single certificate, single invoice. Clear pairing.
PASSED — Consignor match (Calderys Nordic AB), consignee match (CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED), and reference number match (2264501601).
MATCH — 'Calderys Nordic AB' found in invoice header, footer, and closing text. Direct name match; no need to proceed to 4.1.3 sequential testing.
MATCH — Sweden confirmed via explicit text and SE-prefix on VAT number.
Primary billing field (Company block) identified with CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED.
MATCH — Exact name match after ignoring parenthetical former name.
MATCH — India = INDIA after case normalization.
No article numbers in certificate goods description. Proceed to Priority 2.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH — 'Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6' matches 'SVENSKA™ MIX 5 A60 0.6' after normalization.
™ symbol treated as non-identity-bearing. Does not affect matching.
Box 7 value: NW 100,800 kg. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
MATCH — Invoice 100.800 TO × 1000 = 100,800 kg = certificate NW 100,800 kg.
Certificate states NW. Invoice has single quantity without explicit GW/NW. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: single value matches, no contradictory alternative → MATCH.
MATCH — 'MADE IN SWEDEN' found in invoice.
MATCH — Sweden = SWEDEN after case normalization.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Calderys Nordic AB i Sverige, mottagaren Calderys India Refractories Limited i Indien, varubeskrivningen Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6, kvantiteten 100 800 kg nettovikt och ursprungslandet Sverige kan samtliga verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport — Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Forshammarsgatan 2, SE- 662 32, ÅMÅL, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden (Box 216, SE-263 23 Höganäs)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) — Consignor-namn identifierat i fakturans sidhuvud, sidfot och avslutningstext. Land verifierat via explicit text och SE-prefix på momsnummer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'Calderys Nordic AB' i Sverige återfinns uttryckligen i fakturans sidhuvud ('Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'), sidfot och avslutningstext. Landet Sverige bekräftas genom explicit text samt SE-prefix på VAT-nummer (SE556012980001). Att gatuadressen skiljer sig (Forshammarsgatan 2, Åmål vs Box 216, Höganäs) utgör inte MISMATCH enligt regel 4.1.5.

sections.certificate_value: CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED, SURVEY NO.77/1 VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI SHEELPARA-PANVEL ROAD DIST.THANE, MAHARASHTRA, India
sections.invoice_value: CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED (FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED), SURVEY NO.77/1,VILLAGE:DAHISAR-MORI SHEELPARA - PANVEL ROAD, 0 DIST. THANE, MAHRASH, INDIA
sections.rule_applied: Primärt faktureringsfält (4.2.0.2) — Företagsnamnet matchar exakt. Parentetisk uppgift om tidigare namn utgör inte avvikelse.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'CALDERYS INDIA REFRACTORIES LIMITED' matchar exakt det primära företagsnamnet i fakturans Company-block. Fakturans tillägg '(FORMERLY ACE CALDERYS LIMITED)' är historisk information om namnbyte och utgör inte en avvikelse. Landet Indien bekräftas i båda dokumenten.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) — Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning matchar efter tillåten normalisering av versaler, varumärkessymbol och decimaltecken.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets produktnamn 'Svenska Mix 5 A60 0,6' matchar fakturans 'SVENSKA™ MIX 5 A60 0.6' efter normalisering: versaler/gemener, varumärkessymbolen ™ (icke-identitetsbärande tillägg per 4.3.4), och decimaltecken (komma vs punkt). Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen — produktnamn, modellnummer och storleksspecifikation — är identisk.

sections.rule_applied: Undantag 3B — Enhetsomräkning MT↔KG (4.4.5.3). Fakturans 100,800 TO (100.800 metriska ton) × 1000 = 100 800 kg = certifikatets NW 100 800 kg.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger NW 100,800 kg (nettovikt 100 800 kg med komma som tusentalsavskiljare). Fakturan anger 100,800 TO (100.800 metriska ton med komma som decimaltecken i europeiskt format). Omräkning: 100.800 MT × 1000 = 100 800 kg. Värdena är exakt lika efter enhetsomräkning enligt undantag 3B. Viktkategorin NW anges i certifikatet; fakturan har ett enda kvantitetsvärde utan motstridande alternativ, vilket uppfyller regel 4.4.2.2 punkt 2.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering (4.5.1) — 'MADE IN SWEDEN' i fakturan bekräftar ursprungslandet.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' i ruta 3 bekräftas uttryckligen av fakturans text 'MADE IN SWEDEN'. Exakt matchning efter normalisering av versaler.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) resulterade i MATCH. Certifikat SEG-26D-448659 utfärdat av Calderys Nordic AB kan verifieras mot faktura 2269800420. Dokumentparet bedöms som IDENTICAL och är kvalificerat för automatiskt godkännande.
